ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trial_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., Hospital, Clinic, University) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants the site can handle */,
  "facility_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the facilities available at the site */,
  "regulatory_compliance" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the site is compliant with regulatory standards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with the participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the participant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant was enrolled in the trial */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date the participant withdrew from the trial */,
  "reason_for_withdrawal" TEXT /* Reason for withdrawal, if applicable */,
  "consent_form_signed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the participant signed the consent form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with the outcome */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_measured" TEXT /* What was measured to determine the outcome */,
  "outcome_value" TEXT /* The value or result of the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome_status" TEXT /* Status of the outcome (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_adverse_events" (
  "adverse_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adverse event */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with the adverse event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant associated with the adverse event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of adverse event (e.g., Mild, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the adverse event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the adverse event occurred */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the adverse event */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the adverse event was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adverse_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_adverse_events_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES trial_participants ("participant_id")
)
